title: 高松宮記念の後に・遠ざかる背中

text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki seizes victory in the Takamatsunomiya
Kinen and her fans' expectations for her climb
ever higher.

But her behavior seems off ever since that day.
She seems constantly distracted and distant...

The amount of attention Fuji Kiseki is getting
from the world is reaching the point of becoming
a social phenomenon. Next up is the Yasuda
Kinen, a mile-long race that's right up her alley.
